case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. GUOXIAN LI

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LI, GUOXIAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-29-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LI, GUOXIAN
DECLARATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH C.C.P. 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED DEC-24-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LI, GUOXIAN
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GRAVES, MISHAELA J SUBSTITUTED FOR MERRILL, ANN K. AS ATTORNEY FOR ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LI, GUOXIAN
DECLARATION OF COMPUTATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, GUOXIAN $9,453.37 PRINCIPAL, $2,051.28 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,794.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
